sizecraft.config.title: SizeCraft Configuration
sizecraft.config.default_scale.tooltip: Scale applied to new players or on reset.
sizecraft.config.global_min.tooltip: Minimum scale any player can be set to (unless overridden per-player).
sizecraft.config.global_max.tooltip: Maximum scale any player can be set to (unless overridden per-player).
sizecraft.config.allow_self_resize.toolt: Whether non-operator players can resize themselves.
sizecraft.config.animation_ticks.tooltip: How many ticks the resize animation takes. 0 for instant. 20 ticks = 1 second.
sizecraft.config.enable_particles.toolti: Show sparkle particles when a player changes size.
sizecraft.config.capture_enabled.tooltip: Master toggle for the player capture and eating system.
sizecraft.config.capture_min_ratio.toolt: Minimum size ratio (carrier/target) required to capture a player.
sizecraft.config.capture_require_shift.t: Whether the carrier must be sneaking (shift) to capture a player.
sizecraft.config.default_hammerspace_esc: Default setting for whether eaten players can escape from a hammerspace.
sizecraft.config.default_escape_delay.to: Default number of ticks before an eaten player can escape. 600 = 30 seconds.
sizecraft.config.max_escape_delay.toolti: Server-imposed maximum escape delay in ticks. 6000 = 5 minutes.
sizecraft.config.force_hammerspace_escap: If enabled, all hammerspaces are forcibly escapable regardless of player settings.
sizecraft.command.set.clamped: Requested %s was clamped to %s (within allowed bounds).
sizecraft.command.self_resize_disabled: Self-resize is disabled on this server.
sizecraft.command.hammerspace.leave.eate: You cannot leave while eaten. Use /hammerspace escape instead.
sizecraft.command.hammerspace.return.no_: No return position stored for %s. Returned to world spawn.
sizecraft.command.release.none: You are not carrying any captured players.
sizecraft.command.release.not_held: %s is not currently captured or eaten.
sizecraft.command.release.not_yours: That player is not held by you. Admin permission required.
sizecraft.command.escape.not_eaten: You are not currently eaten by anyone.
sizecraft.command.escape.wait: You must wait %s more seconds before you can escape.
sizecraft.command.escape.blocked: Escape is not available from this %s.
sizecraft.command.hammerspace.delay: Hammerspace escape delay set to %s ticks (%s seconds).
sizecraft.command.hammerspace.name.too_l: Name must be 64 characters or fewer.
sizecraft.capture.not_predator: You must enable predator mode first (/sizecraft predator on).
sizecraft.capture.not_prey: %s does not have prey mode enabled.
sizecraft.capture.too_small: You must be at least %sx larger than your target to capture them.
sizecraft.capture.eaten_by: You have been eaten by %s! You are now in their %s.
sizecraft.capture.ate: You ate %s! They are now in your %s.
